name: Gygès
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Gygès (Claude Leroy): a no-ownership race on a 6x6 board. The 12 pieces belong to nobody and are stacks of height 1/2/3 (a movement rank, not ownership). You may only move a piece in the occupied row nearest your own side; it travels exactly its height in orthogonal steps and, if it would land on an occupied square, either BOUNCES onward by that piece's height or REPLACES it elsewhere. Win by landing a piece on your goal cell beyond the opponent's home edge.
